objective: Exploratory ALS benchmark subset that extends the accession-coded CNS core with Answer ALS induced motor-neuron resources.
inclusion_principles: Preserve the accession-coded CNS core as the strict benchmark anchor.
Add induced motor-neuron evidence only when the paper provides explicit counts and the provenance gaps are clearly flagged.
Keep unresolved multi-comparison CNS accessions excluded until per-comparison manifests are modeled explicitly; split `GSE67196` and `GSE124439` comparisons are now admitted.

included_datasets.case_definition: Motor cortex samples from familial ALS C9ORF72 expansion carriers
included_datasets.reason: Explicit Table 1 motor cortex comparison with accession-coded case and control counts.

included_datasets.case_definition: Motor neurons from familial ALS C9ORF72 expansion carriers
included_datasets.reason: Explicit Table 1 motor-neuron comparison with accession-coded case and control counts.

included_datasets.case_definition: Motor neurons from familial ALS SOD1 carriers
included_datasets.reason: Explicit Table 1 motor-neuron comparison with accession-coded case and control counts.
Explicit Table 1 sALS motor cortex comparison with accession-coded counts.
Explicit Table 1 motor-neuron comparison with accession-coded counts; GEO metadata identifies the case arm as CHMP2B-related ALS.
Explicit Table 1 spinal motor-neuron comparison with accession-coded counts.

included_datasets.case_definition: Familial ALS C9ORF72 frontal cortex samples
included_datasets.reason: Split from GSE67196 Table 1 frontal-cortex C9ORF72 comparison using the public rawcount matrix.
Split from GSE67196 Table 1 cerebellar C9ORF72 comparison using the public rawcount matrix.
Split from GSE67196 Table 1 frontal-cortex sporadic ALS comparison using the public rawcount matrix.
Split from GSE67196 Table 1 cerebellar sporadic ALS comparison using the public rawcount matrix.
Split from GSE124439 Table 1 frontal-cortex sporadic ALS comparison using the public per-sample RNA-seq count tarball.
Split from GSE124439 Table 1 motor-cortex sporadic ALS comparison using the public per-sample RNA-seq count tarball.

included_datasets.case_definition: Familial or sporadic ALS induced motor neurons
included_datasets.reason: Table 1 reports explicit diMN transcriptomic counts, but the exact public identifiers and per-subtype subset manifests still need stable recovery.

included_datasets.case_definition: Familial or sporadic ALS induced motor-neuron proteomes
included_datasets.reason: Table 1 reports explicit diMN proteomic counts, but the exact public identifiers and per-subtype subset manifests still need stable recovery.

excluded_datasets.reason: Control-reference accession for the E-MTAB-1925 comparison rather than a standalone ALS discovery cohort.

notes: This exploratory subset broadens ALS context with induced motor-neuron evidence while keeping unresolved public-identifier gaps explicit.
